form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. Latest effort finished 5th over 278m at this track beaten 10 lengths (16.73) behind Teddy Danger in a Grade 5 on March 16. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked shortly after start; Severely checked approaching first turn.

form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (16.20) over 278m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at his last three starts, the latest when third (19.51) at Hobart. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 278m. Last start finished 3rd over 278m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (16.18) behind Indy Grant in a Free For All on March 30. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (16.14) over 278m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 278m at this track, beaten 10 lengths (16.61) behind Indy Grant in a Free For All on March 30. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth over 278m at this track, beaten 10 lengths (16.61) behind Indy Grant in a Free For All on March 30. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

form.formComment: Could manage only fifth last time but turned heads the start prior when he was an eye-catching winner scoring by 3 lengths in a Free For All at this track and clocking a dazzling 15.87 over the 278m trip. Rates on top and can find winning form again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped and was checked; Hit to the rails.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (16.15) over 278m at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate and looks safely held.

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd on April 2 over 340m at Hobart behind Ticking Over beaten half a length (19.51) in a Restricted WIN. Found one better last time. Well placed and worth following up.
